commonObjections.objection: Why should we invest in custom build instead of standard packages?
commonObjections.answer: Standard packages force you to pay high per-user monthly subscription fees and restrict custom feature integrations. A custom system has zero recurring license fees and fits your exact workflow.

commonMistakes: Subscribing to generic tools with complex features your team doesn't use.
Leaving historical database records uncleaned before migrating systems.
Ignoring mobile screens, causing layout breakages for operations staff.

faqs.q: How long does custom system development take?
faqs.a: A tailored system requires 3 to 6 weeks depending on custom integrations, roles complexity, and database volumes.
Yes, we apply secure HTTPS channels, encrypted columns, and PostgreSQL row-level security parameters.
